milestones.name: The Hands Were Joined
milestones.description: Form an alliance by adding a second religion to your civilization.
milestones.chronicleLine: In its early days, the civilization opened its gates to a second faith.

milestones.name: Stones Made Sacred
milestones.description: Create two holy sites across your civilization's religions.
milestones.chronicleLine: Two holy sites now bore the civilization's mark across the land.

milestones.name: The Smoke Rose Five Times
milestones.description: Complete five rituals across your civilization's holy sites.
milestones.chronicleLine: Five rites had been completed at the civilization's altars.

milestones.name: All Four Winds Bowed
milestones.description: Unite four deity domains under your civilization's banner.
milestones.chronicleLine: Four of the great domains stood together beneath one banner.

milestones.name: A People, Not a Few
milestones.description: Reach 25 members across all religions in your civilization.
milestones.chronicleLine: Five and twenty souls now answered to the civilization's name.

milestones.name: The First Temple Rose
milestones.description: Upgrade any holy site to Tier 2 (Temple).
milestones.chronicleLine: A holy site had been raised to the rank of temple.

milestones.name: Quills Met at the Border
milestones.description: Form a Non-Aggression Pact or Alliance with another civilization.
milestones.chronicleLine: A pact was sealed with a neighbouring civilization.

milestones.name: Fifty Spears, Fifty Names
milestones.description: Achieve 50 PvP kills during active wars.
milestones.chronicleLine: Fifty had fallen to the civilization's warriors in open war.

milestones.name: The Civilization Endures
milestones.description: Complete all five major milestones to achieve legendary status.
milestones.chronicleLine: All five great deeds were done. The civilization passed into legend.
